fuses.description: Cayenne Turbo, Cayenne S, Cayenne S [E Hybrid] secondary air pump
Cayenne Turbo, Cayenne S, [Cayenne S Diesel], [Cayenne Diesel: starter motor relay] / Secondary air pump
Cayenne S [E Hybrid]: vacuum pump relay
Cayenne Turbo, Cayenne S: pencil ignition coil
Cayenne S [Diesel], Cayenne [Diesel] high-pressure control valve, high-pressure pump
Cayenne Turbo: tank vent valve, boost pressure valve, recirculation valve, crankcase heater
Cayenne S [E Hybrid] charge air cooler water pump
Cayenne S: tank vent valve, electropneumatic converter, crankcase heater, air recirculation valve, secondary air pump relay, sound symposer
Cayenne Turbo: engine control unit, flow control valve
Cayenne S, Cayenne Diesel, Cayenne S [E Hybrid] engine control unit. Cayenne S [Diesel] engine control unit (master)

Cayenne Turbo: tank leak diagnosis, secondary air pump relay, electronic exhaust outlet valves, Hall sensor, oil level sensor. Cayenne S: tank leak diagnosis, electronic exhaust outlet valves. Cayenne S [E-Hybrid] vacuum pump, secondary air pump, tank leak diagnosis. Cayenne [Diesel] glow plug control unit, exhaust gas recirculation cooling switchover valve, regulated oil pump control valve, map-controlled thermostat, engine mounts, pressure converter. Cayenne S [Diesel] glow plug control unit, regulated oil pump control valve, exhaust gas recirculation cooling switchover valve, cooling water switchover valve, radiator fan control unit, brake pedal sensor, radiator shutter
Cayenne Turbo: valve lift controller, camshaft controller, map-controlled thermostat
Cayenne S: map-controlled thermostat, camshaft controller, valve lift controller
Cayenne S [Diesel] oil level sensor, crankcase heater
Cayenne S [E Hybrid] oil level and temperature sensor
Cayenne S [E Hybrid] camshaft control, tumble flap
Cayenne S [E Hybrid] oil pump regulated by control valve, high-pressure pump flow control valve, tank vent valve, main water pump valve, electric machine bypass valve
Cayenne S: camshaft sensor, oil level sensor
Cayenne [Diesel] SCR drive module, electronic tank evaluation system
main relay, additionally Cayenne S [E Hybrid] engine control unit
Cayenne S [E Hybrid]: electric water pump

Cayenne Turbo, Cayenne S [Diesel], Cayenne S [E Hybrid] Oxygen sensor upstream of catalytic converter. Cayenne [Diesel] oxygen sensor, NOx sensor upstream of catalytic converter, NOx sensor downstream of catalytic converter, particulate sensor
Cayenne S: Oxygen sensor upstream of catalytic converter
Cayenne Turbo, Cayenne S [E Hybrid] Oxygen sensor downstream of catalytic converter
